violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Excessive ice buildup in the walk in freezer on the food boxes.

Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. -Light shield is cracked and broken in the dish washing area.

General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment, was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. -Can see daylight coming under the back door of the kitchen.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Excessive ice in the walk in freezer not draining properly.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Ceiling in the back room needs repair. Ceiling tile missing directly above the 3 comp sink.

Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. -Light shields in the back of the kitchen are cracked and broke.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
